notes: HKEX stock 0327. Manual bootstrap: annual PDFs ported from 3.0 reference set. HkexFetcher to be implemented (BL-044) for automation. HKFRS is IFRS-equivalent (applied by PwC-audited entity). All financial statements in HK$'000. No interest-bearing borrowings (confirmed 2022-2024). EBITDA explicitly stated in segment note per year. Weighted-average basic shares from Note 12 each filing. D&A reported as sub-components in Note 7 EXPENSES BY NATURE (PPE + ROU + intangibles); additive accumulation required to reach total.
